paths.notes: This file itself. Only writable by `code-architect owners bootstrap` or `owners migrate`; never a general edit target.
Config dir for CA-managed lockfiles + contracts. Run.lock is handled atomically by safe-json; humans review anything else.
Methodology spine — distilled output, never hand-edited (HB#7). `code-architect memory distill` regenerates; anything else is a hard error.
SHA-256 manifest of methodology source files. Generated at distill time; hand-edits silently break the drift check.
Memory index. CA writes new card entries; DA gate confirms index matches `memory/active/` files.
CA pattern + failure-analysis cards. CA-authored at distill time; DA gate verifies frontmatter schema + cap compliance (30 active, ≤100/200 word body).
Pruned cards. Restoration is `code-architect memory restore` (human-driven); direct edits suspicious.
CLI entry point. Behavior-critical; CLAUDE.md HB#10 invocation boundary enforced here. Humans review any change.
Shared library code (safe-json port, todayET helpers, run-ledger). Mechanical refactors common; DA-gated.
Claude Code hooks (if any). Behavior-critical; humans review.
Scheduled task entry points. Deploy-pipeline territory; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.
CA's own implementation. Default-restrict; sub-paths above carve out where mechanical refactor is safe.
Test code. Refactor-friendly; DA-gated.
Sample owners.json files used for manifest-validator tests. Mechanical add/update common.
CA's own registry tooling (manifest validators, etc). Mechanical changes common.
Intake docs, design proposals, audit findings, handoffs. CA writes these constantly; DA gate confirms no committed secrets / no overwriting another agent's intake.
Session-face HTML + state-of-things snapshots. CA refreshes per session per [[project_session_face_html_pattern]].
Append-mostly hygiene. CA may add ignore patterns; DA verifies no live tracked files would be untracked (`git ls-files | grep <pattern>` empty).
CA's mesh manifest. Mesh-contract surface; humans review every change.
Operating instructions for the Claude Code invocation. Behavior-critical; humans review.
Public-facing repo overview. Humans review.
Dependencies + npm scripts. Humans review additions/removals.
Lockfile churn from `npm install` is mechanical; DA-gated.
CI/CD workflows (none yet — placeholder). Deploy-pipeline; CLAUDE.md T3 + DA-mandatory.

fallback.notes: Default-deny posture: anything not matched above requires human review.
